Processing of Applications Filed Prior to August 11, 1964, , , provided that:Pub. L. 88–417, § 278 Stat. 389Aug. 11, 1964“Any valid application for permit under that Act [this chapter], on file with the Secretary of the Interior on the effective date of this Act [], may be processed in the same manner as if this Act [repealing sections 351 to 355 and 357 to 360 of this title] had not been enacted.”Aug. 11, 1964
